name: engineering-workflows
description: Adapted engineering workflow skills for diagnosis, TDD, planning interviews, architecture review, and codebase orientation.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose, test, plan, and review codebases.
interface.longDescription: Codex-adapted workflow skills for disciplined debugging, test-driven development, planning interviews, architecture review, and high-level codebase orientation. These skills are adapted from Matt Pocock's MIT-licensed skills repository with per-skill source attribution preserved in Agent Skills frontmatter metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use $engineering-workflows:tdd to implement this with a red-green-refactor loop.
Use $engineering-workflows:zoom-out to explain how this code area fits into the larger system.
Use $engineering-workflows:improve-codebase-architecture to find architecture deepening opportunities.
